leadText: Paniola Town (Japanese: オハナタウン Ohana Town) is a town on Akala Island in the Alola region. Route 4 leads to Paniola Town from the south, and the town connects to Paniola Ranch in the north. An isolated area of Paniola Town can be accessed from Route 6.
